strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB from roles like Optilyz and re:cinq
Proven expertise in scalable architectures, including Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, SQS)
Strong background in clean software practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and collaborative workflows
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of senior-level experience in leadership and complex systems
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primary requirement) and React/Nest.js (key stack elements)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with current remote work setup at re:cinq
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep technical expertise and leadership experience far exceeding the junior/mid-level role's requirements. While their skills (TypeScript, AWS, Kubernetes) align well with the role's needs, their seniority and current work setup (remote at re:cinq) pose misalignment with the position's expectations for an entry-level contributor and high on-site presence.
